## Feature Type

- [ ] New Topic (suggest adding new knowledge area)
- [ ] Chapter Reorganization (improve document structure)
- [ ] Tool/Process Improvement (enhance contribution workflow)
- [ ] Interactive Feature (improve user experience)
- [ ] Other

- [ ] Struct/ (Formal Theory)
- [ ] Knowledge/ (Knowledge Structure)
- [ ] Flink/ (Flink Specific)
- [ ] Global/Project-wide
- [ ] Other: ___________
